item.title: Wakefield Acceleration
item.description:
• Efficiency versus instability in plasma accelerators — Lebedev et al. (2017)
  • Acceleration of a trailing positron bunch in a plasma wakefield accelerator — Doche et al. (2017)
  • Multi-gigaelectronvolt acceleration of positrons in a self-loaded plasma wakefield — Corde et al. (2015)
  • Plasma-wakefield acceleration of a positron beam — Lee et al. (2001)

item.description: • HB 2025

item.title: Electron Cloud Instability
item.description:
• Linearized method for the study of transverse instabilities driven by electron cloud — Iadarola et al. (2020)
  • Mitigating the electron cloud effect in the SuperKEKB positron ring — Suetsugu et al. (2019)
  • ECLOUD’18: Proceedings of the Joint INFN-CERN-ARIES Workshop on Electron-Cloud Effects
  • Electron cloud buildup driving spontaneous vertical instabilities of stored beams in the Large Hadron Collider — Romano et al. (2018)
  • First electron-cloud studies at the Large Hadron Collider — Dominguez et al. (2013)
  • Electron cloud self-consistent simulations for the SNS ring — Shishlo et al. (2006)
  • Simulation of E-cloud using ORBIT: benchmarks and first application — Sato et al. (2005)
  • Probabilistic model for the simulation of secondary electron emission — Furman and Pivi (2002)

item.title: Philosophy of Science
item.description:
• Time and Chance — David Albert (2000)
  • Philosophy of Physics: Space and Time — Tim Maudlin (2014)
  • Philosophy of Physics: Quantum Theory — Tim Maudlin (2019)
  • The Emergent Multiverse: Quantum Theory according to the Everett Interpretation — David Wallace (2014)
  • How the Laws of Physics Lie — Nancy Cartwright (1983)
  • Laws of Physics — Eddie Chen (2024)
  • Causation as Folk Science — John Norton (2003)

Videos

  • Timothy Williamson: Is Philosophy a Science?

Queue

  • Studies in the Logic of Confirmation — Carl Gustav Hempel (1945)
  • Two Dogmas of Empiricism — Willard Van Orman Quine (1951)
  • Science: Conjectures and Refutations — Karl Popper (1962)
  • The Structure of Scientific Revolutions — Thomas Kuhni (1962)
  • Scientific Revolutions — Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy (2009)
  • “The Structure of Scientific Revolutions” and its Significance: An Essay Review of the Fiftieth Anniversary Edition — Alexander Bird (2012)

item.title: Beam and Plasma Physics Simulations
item.description:
• TEAPOT: A thin element accelerator program for optics and tracking
  • Noninvariance of Space- and Time-Scale Ranges under a Lorentz Transformation and the Implications for the Study of Relativistic Interactions
  • Symplectic multiparticle tracking model for self-consistent space-charge simulation
  • Symplectic particle-in-cell model for space-charge beam dynamics simulation
  • Symplectic machine learning model for fast simulation of space-charge effects
  • TOUTATIS: A radio frequency quadrupole code
  • Lie Methods for Nonlinear Dynamics with Applications to Accelerator Physics
  • Direct Vlasov solvers
  • Snowmass21 Accelerator Modeling Community White Paper
  • Quantum-inspired method for solving the Vlasov-Poisson equations
  • Differentiable self-consistent space-charge simulation for accelerator design
  • Two-and-a-half dimensional symplectic space-charge solver
  • Grid dependent noise and entropy growth in anisotropic 3d particle-in-cell simulation of high intensity beams

Codes

  • PyORBIT
  • ImpactX
  • Xsuite
  • MADX
  • Bmad
  • Cheetah
  • JuTrack
  • BLonD

item.title: Nonlinear Dynamics
item.description: • Hamiltonian theory of the crossing of the 2Qx− 2Qy = 0 — Bazzani, Capoani, and M. Giovannozzi (2022)

item.title: Particle Accelerators
item.description:
Eventually turn into a database of particle accelerators since 1930, with links to papers or websites.

  • Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL)
  • Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratoy (LBNL)
  • Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory (FNAL)
  • SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory (SLAC)
  • Los Alamos National Laboratory (LANL)
  • Spallation Neutron Source (SNS)
  • European Council for Nuclear Research (CERN)
  • Paul Scherrer Institute (PSI)
  • European Spallation Source (ESS)
  • ISIS Neutron Source
  • Electron Ion Collider (EIC)
  • Relativistic Heavy Ion Collider (RHIC)
  • Future Circular Collider (FCC)
  • International Muon Collider Collaboration (IMCC)
  • US Muon Collider Collaboration (USMCC)
  • J-PARC
  • MYRRHA

item.title: Halo Formation
item.description:
Title Author Year
Analytic Model for Halo Formation in High Current Ion Linacs Gluckstern 1994
Stability of a Uniform-Density Breathing Beam with Circular Cross Section Gluckstern, Cheng, and Ye 1995
Stability and halo formation of a breathing axisymmetric uniform-density beam Gluckstern et al. 1996
Simulation study of halo formation in breathing round beams Okamoto and Ikegami 1997
Particle-core model for transverse dynamics of beam halo Wangler, et al. 1998
Halo formation in three-dimensional bunches Gluckstern et al. 1998
Beam-Halo Measurements in High-Current Proton Beams Allen et al. 2002
Fluctuations Do Matter: Large Noise-Enhanced Halos in Charged-Particle Beams Bohn and Sideris 2003
Analytical treatment of particle-core interaction Batygin 2010
Chaotic Dynamics Driven by Particle-Core Interactions Batygin and Batygin 2021

item.title: Space Charge
item.description:
To do: start adding category labels.

Title Author Year
Space-Charge Effects During Half-Integer Resonance Crossing in the CERN PSB Prebibaj et al. 2025
Modeling of beam envelope instabilities in high-intensity circular accelerators Yuan 2025
Phase space analysis of incoherent space-charge-driven structural resonances in high-intensity hadron synchrotrons Liu et al. 2025
Modeling of beam envelope instabilities in high-intensity circular accelerators Yuan 2025
Pulsed Electron Lenses for Space Charge Mitigation Oeftiger and Boine-Frankenheim 2024
Simulation study of the space charge limit in heavy-ion synchrotrons Oeftiger et al. 2023
3D theory of microscopic instabilities driven by space-charge forces Litvinenko et al. 2023
Characterization of overlapping betatron resonances above the phase advance of 90° per cell Kojima and Okamoto 2022
Self-consistent long-term dynamics of space charge driven resonances in 2D and 3D Hofmann et al. 2022
Effects of beam spinning on the fourth-order particle resonance of 3D bunched beams in high-intensity linear accelerators Cheon et al. 2022
Rapid charge redistribution leading to core hollowing in a high-intensity ion beam Ruisard and Aleksandrov 2021
Understanding beam distributions in hadron linacs in the presence of space charge Aleksandrov, Ruisard, and Cousineau 2021
Kurth Vlasov-Poisson Solution for a Beam in the Presence of Time-Dependent Isotropic Focusing Mitchell, Hwang and Ryne 2021
Chaotic Dynamics Driven by Particle-Core Interactions Batygin and Batygin 2021
Effects of the Montague resonance on the formation of the beam distribution during multiturn injection painting in a high-intensity proton ring Hotchi 2020
Revisiting coherent and incoherent resonances with space charge Hofmann 2020
Identification and characterization of high order incoherent space charge driven structure resonances in the CERN Proton Synchrotron Asvesta et al. 2020
Empirical condition of betatron resonances with space charge Kojima et al. 2019
Density shocks in the relativistic expansion of highly charged one component plasmas Zerbe et al. 2019
Spectral Galerkin solver for intense beam Vlasov equilibria in nonlinear constant focusing channels Mitchell 2019
Dynamical bunching and density peaks in expanding Coulomb clouds Zerbe et al. 2018
Intensity limitations due to space charge for bunch compression in synchrotrons Yuan, et al. 2018
Structure resonances due to space charge in periodic focusing channels Li and Jameson 2018
Modeling of second order space charge driven coherent sum and difference instabilities Yuan et al. 2017
Revisiting the Longitudinal 90° Limit in High Intensity Linear Accelerators Hofmann and Boine-Frankenheim 2017
Parametric instabilities in 3D periodically focused beams with space charge Hofmann and Boine-Frankenheim 2017
Dispersion-Induced Beam Instability in Circular Accelerators Yuan et al. 2017
Modeling of second order space charge driven coherent sum and difference instabilities Yuan, et al. 2017
Space-Charge Structural Instabilities and Resonances in High-Intensity Beams Hofmann and Boine-Frankenheim 2015
Near equilibrium distributions for beams with space charge in linear and nonlinear periodic focusing systems Sonnad and Cary 2015
Compensating tune spread induced by space charge in bunched beams Litvinenko and Wang 2014
Envelope instability and the fourth order resonance Li and Zhao 2014
Class of Generalized Kapchinskij-Vladimirskij Solutions and Associated Envelope Equations for High-Intensity Charged-Particle Beams Qin and Davidson 2013
Coulomb explosion of uniformly charged spheroids Grech et al. 2011
Experiment on space charge driven nonlinear resonance crossing in an ion synchrotron Franchetti et al. 2010
Analytical treatment of particle-core interaction Batygin 2010
Experimental Evidence of the 90° Stop Band in the GSI UNILAC Groening et al. 2009
Benchmarking of measurement and simulation of transverse rms-emittance growth Groening et al. 2009
Generation of initial kinetic distributions for simulation of long-pulse charged particle beams with high space-charge intensity Lund et al. 2009
Generalized Kapchinskij-Vladimirskij Distribution and Envelope Equation for High-Intensity Beams in a Coupled Transverse Focusing Lattice Qin, Chung, and Davidson 2009
A core-particle model for periodically focused ion beams with intense space-charge Lund et al. 2007
Self-consistent study of space-charge-driven coupling resonances Hofmann and Franchetti 2006
Space charge modeling of dense electron beams with large energy spreads Fubiani et al. 2006
Efficient computation of matched solutions of the Kapchinskij-Vladimirskij envelope equations for periodic focusing lattices Lund et al. 2006
Space-charge transport limits of ion beams in periodic quadrupole focusing channels Lund and Chawla 2006
Stability properties of the transverse envelope equations describing intense ion beam transport Lund and Bukh 2004
Space charge resonances in two and three dimensional anisotropic beams Hofmann et al. 2003
Simulations and experiments with space-charge-dominated beams Kishek et al. 2003
Fluctuations Do Matter: Large Noise-Enhanced Halos in Charged-Particle Beams Bohn and Sideris 2003
Self-consistent time dependent two dimensional and three dimensional space charge distributions with linear force Danilov et al. 2003
Resonant beam behavior studies in the Proton Storage Ring Cousineau et al. 2003
Beam-Halo Measurements in High-Current Proton Beams Allen et al. 2002
Macroparticle simulation studies of a proton beam halo experiment Qiang et al. 2002
Parametric resonances in intense one-dimensional beams propagating through a periodic focusing channel Okamoto and Yokoya 2002
Resonant Emittance Transfer Driven by Space Charge Hofmann and Boine-Frankenheim 2001
Parametric resonances in intense one-dimensional beams propagating through a periodic focusing channel Okamoto and Yokoya 2001
Comparison of simulated and observed beam profile broadening in the Proton Storage Ring and the role of space charge Galambos et al. 2000
Observations and Simulations of Transverse Density Waves in a Collimated Space-Charge Dominated Electron Beam Bernal et al. 1999
Space charge dynamics in high intensity rings Holmes et al. 1999
Halo formation in three-dimensional bunches Gluckstern et al. 1998
Betatron resonances with space charge Baartman 1998
Stability of anisotropic beams with space charge Hofmann 1998
Warm-fluid description of intense beam equilibrium and electrostatic stability properties Lund and Davidson 1998
Particle-core model for transverse dynamics of beam halo Wangler, et al. 1998
Simulation study of halo formation in breathing round beams Okamoto and Ikegami 1997
Rigid-Rotor Vlasov Equilibrium for an Intense Charged-Particle Beam Propagating through a Periodic Solenoidal Magnetic Field Chen, Pakter, and Davidson 1997
Stability and halo formation of a breathing axisymmetric uniform-density beam Gluckstern et al. 1996
Stability of a Uniform-Density Breathing Beam with Circular Cross Section Gluckstern, et al. 1995
Analytic Model for Halo Formation in High Current Ion Linacs Gluckstern 1994
Evolution of RMS beam envelopes in transport systems with linear x-y coupling Chernin 1988
Stability of the Kapchinskij-Vladimirskij (K-V) distribution in long periodic transport systems Hofmann et al. 1983
Theoretical studies of envelope oscillations and instabilities of mismatched intense charged-particle beams in periodic focusing channels Struckmeier and Reiser 1983
On the stability and emittance growth of different particle phase-space distributions in a long magnetic quadrupole channel Struckmeier, Klabunde, Reiser 1983
RMS envelope equations with space charge Sacherer 1971
Fourth-order coupling resonance excited by space-charge forces in a synchrotron Montague 1968
Transverse space-charge effects in circular accelerators Sacherer 1968
Limitations of proton beam current in a strong focusing linear accelerator associated with beam space charge Kapchinskij and Vladimirskij 1959
No matching items

item.title: Collisionless Relaxation
item.description:
• Collisionless Relaxation in Systems with Coulomb Interactions — Kadomtsev and Pogutse (1970)
  • Collisionless Relaxation in Non-Neutral Plasmas — Levin, Pakter, and Teles (2008)
  • Collisionless relaxation in gravitational systems: From violent relaxation to gravothermal collapse — Levin, Pakter, and Rizzato (2008)
  • Core-halo distribution in the Hamiltonian Mean-Field Model — Pakter and Levin (2011)
  • Non-equilibrium Statistical Mechanics of Two-dimensional Vortices — Pakter and Levin (2018)
  • Weak convergence to equilibrium of statistical ensembles in integrable Hamiltonian systems — Mitchell (2019)
  • Generalized Entropy Production in Collisionless Plasma Flows and Turbulence — Zhdankin (2022)

item.title: Sampling
item.description:
• Equation of State Calculations by Fast Computing Machines — Metropolis et al. (1953)
  • MCMC using Hamiltonian dynamics — Neal (2011)
  • The No-U-Turn sampler: adaptively setting path lengths in Hamiltonian Monte Carlo — Hoffman and Gelman (2014)
  • The no-underrun sampler: A locally-adaptive, gradient-free mcmc method — Bou-Rabee et al. (2025)
  • Microcanonical langevin ensembles: Advancing the sampling of bayesian neural networks — Sommer, et al. (2025)

Books

  • Bayesian Data Analysis — Gelman et al. (1995)
  • Data analysis: a Bayesian tutorial — Sivia and Skilling (2006)

item.title: Phase Space Reconstruction
item.description: Collect references on phase space reconstruction/tomography.
